subcodes.title: Words spoken at E.J. Rosenberg's Unity Meeting, 1911-09-08
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, that such a meeting of purity and steadfastness is being held in London.
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @Manifestation of God as educator, @Moses, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @call to action, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity
